name: ghduty
description: GitHub notification duty — automated agent that works your GitHub notification inbox (mentions, review requests, assignments, replies on threads you're in) across all repos and handles each itself: reply directly, /ticket on change requests (filed in the repo's clone under a configurable working folder), /code-review on review requests, optional Slack notify on tickets created. Idempotent by notification read-state (handles unread, marks read when done). Built to run on a schedule.
